message:
feat(mesh): 12 real-component integration tests for MeshNode (9hoz)

Adds real_component_integration module with 12 no-mock tests covering:
session auth gate lifecycle, byte/symbol budget exhaustion, multi-node
gossip convergence, session-gated symbol transfer, quarantine isolation,
DecisionReceipt evidence chains, decode-complete stop, checkpoint
exchange reconciliation, anti-amplification, peer state routing, and
SymbolAck stop sending. All 76 mesh integration tests passing + clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
